headline: Alibaba.com Taxis Toward The B2B e-Commerce Runway
summary: Huge and potentially very profitable. Hardly digitized. Complex and underserved, at least until now. That describes the state of the global business-to-business (B2B) e-commerce market. Not many providers have been able to master the beast. Still fewer focus their energies on small to midsize businesses (SMB) trying to make their way in the digital B2B space.

headline: The Effects Of COVID On The Beauty Industry
summary: According to McKinsey Consulting, the beauty industry saw its sales halve on a year-over-year basis. McKinsey predicts global revenue will fall by up to 30% during 2020. But consumers are still buying beauty products and the industry is adapting to the COVID-19 era. Ironically, this industry is like a cockroach. It always figures out how to survive.

headline: 4 Solar Stocks That Could Be Even Better Than Tesla
